case_title: VAL STEIL VS. RASHI BATRA ET AL

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-01-2018 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RASHI BATRA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEIL, VAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BATRA, RASHI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 641 28TH AVENUE, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121**ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT HAS BEEN CANCELED** , SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BATRA, RASHI
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT BATRA, RASHI
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEIL, VAL AS TO DEFENDANT BATRA, RASHI
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT BATRA, RASHI HEARING SET FOR AUG-01-2018 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BATRA, RASHI
